meta.question: Which of the organization's models include tasks related to buying products? (Organization ID: 985f88f59e8b4962a0a2c2fec001b6d1)
meta.finalAnswer:
The model "Wohnungskauf (BPMN Choreographie)" (Apartment Purchase) belonging to the specified organization includes tasks related to the buying process. Relevant tasks within this model include:

- "Unterschreiben des Vertrags" (Signing the contract)
- "Kredit geben" (Granting a loan)
- "Kredit" (Loan)
- "Wohnung angenommen" (Apartment accepted)
- "Wohnung abgelehnt" (Apartment rejected)
